name: seojeom-mcp
description: Local-first MCP for project wiki and graph workflows. Stores everything under your project directory, not a remote SaaS.
long_description: Seojeom is a local-first MCP server for Claude and Codex. It connects the assistant to a project-local wiki under <project-root>/wiki and a local graph snapshot under <project-root>/.seojeom/graph/, with deterministic workflows, runbooks, and playbooks for novel writing and worldbuilding. All mutations pass through an approval queue; no remote service is required.

project_root.title: Project Root
project_root.description: Your novel or worldbuilding project directory. The server will read and write wiki/ and .seojeom/ under this path.

project_id.title: Project ID
project_id.description: Stable identifier for this project (used in file paths). Use a short slug, e.g. 'my-novel'.

tools.name: seojeom_project_info
tools.description: Return the currently bound project metadata and server status.

tools.name: seojeom_get_claude_mcp_onboarding
tools.description: Return the install command and recommended first tool calls for a Claude operator.

tools.name: seojeom_list_graph_playbooks
tools.description: List available local graph playbook presets for Claude/Codex operators.

tools.name: seojeom_prepare_graph_playbook
tools.description: Expand a named playbook into phased operator steps, approval checkpoints, and verification guidance.

tools.name: seojeom_list_wiki_pages
tools.description: List wiki pages for the current project.

tools.name: seojeom_read_wiki
tools.description: Read a single wiki page and optionally its section index.

tools.name: seojeom_write_wiki
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page. All mutations pass through the approval queue.

tools.name: seojeom_list_nodes
tools.description: List graph nodes with optional type, plane, and text filters.

tools.name: seojeom_search_nodes
tools.description: Search graph nodes by text query, with optional type filters.

tools.name: seojeom_get_node
tools.description: Load one node plus neighboring edges and aggregate detail.

tools.name: seojeom_neighborhood
tools.description: Load a graph neighborhood around one focus ref with configurable depth.

tools.name: seojeom_build_graph_context
tools.description: Build a prompt-ready local graph context bundle around an optional focus node.

tools.name: seojeom_analyze_graph_gaps
tools.description: Analyze structural graph gaps without calling upstream APIs or LLM workflows.

tools.name: seojeom_prepare_graph_workflow
tools.description: Combine local graph context, gap findings, and deterministic next-tool recommendations.

tools.name: seojeom_prepare_graph_research
tools.description: Build a local-first research plan from graph context, wiki matches, and gap findings.

tools.name: seojeom_prepare_graph_runbook
tools.description: Combine workflow and research into one ordered runbook for graph editing sessions.

tools.name: seojeom_prepare_graph_session
tools.description: Turn the runbook into a Claude-ready session contract with grounding rules and ordered tool calls.

tools.name: seojeom_prepare_graph_focused_session
tools.description: Prepare a focused session for wiki documentation, packet repair, or relation fill-in work.

tools.name: seojeom_propose_node
tools.description: Persist a node_form proposal into the graph proposal queue.

tools.name: seojeom_propose_edge
tools.description: Persist an edge_form proposal into the graph proposal queue.

tools.name: seojeom_list_proposal_sets
tools.description: List persisted graph proposal sets for the current project.

tools.name: seojeom_decide_proposal_set
tools.description: Mark a graph proposal set as approved, rejected, needs_revision, or superseded.

tools.name: seojeom_apply_proposal_set
tools.description: Apply a persisted graph proposal set to the canonical graph.

tools.name: seojeom_apply_graph_mutation
tools.description: Apply a direct canonical graph mutation for the current project.

tools.name: seojeom_list_graph_scenes
tools.description: List locally persisted graph scene summaries.

tools.name: seojeom_read_graph_scene
tools.description: Read a local graph scene by id, or the default scene when no id is provided.

tools.name: seojeom_save_graph_scene
tools.description: Persist local graph scene objects, links, and viewport state.

tools.name: seojeom_create_graph_scene
tools.description: Create a new local graph scene.

tools.name: seojeom_get_default_graph_scene
tools.description: Read or create the default local graph scene.

tools.name: seojeom_search_wiki_pages
tools.description: Search wiki pages by title, path, tags, or section text.
